summary: PASS for the closure/audit slice only. Prior immutable PASS verdicts for MVP-02-admin-code-status-view-001 and MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001 cover the non-human technical scope of MVP-02.04: backend/admin API status data contract plus minimal read-only admin UI/status view. MVP-02.04 is correctly recorded as DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING; full MVP-02, the MVP stage and all human gates remain open.
proven_scope: MVP-02-admin-code-status-view-001 prior immutable verdict is PASS with no proof gaps.
MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001 prior immutable verdict is PASS with no proof gaps.
Closure evidence maps those PASS slices to MVP-02.04 and limits coverage to cohort metadata, code statuses, activation/registration funnel counts and a privacy-safe read-only operator view.
MVP-02.04 is recorded as DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING, not DONE.
Full MVP-02 and the MVP stage remain open.
Human gates remain WAITING_HUMAN or otherwise non-DONE.
Canonical docs sync is correctly NOOP.
not_closed: human-gated financial correctness, reward, fulfillment, HR wording and production content approval

acceptance_criteria.detail: The current worktree contains unrelated pre-existing production/canonical/stage changes from prior slices. The closure/audit evidence identifies no closure-owned production code, canonical docs or prior raw evidence rewrites.

checks.detail: Harness failed before this verdict because verdict.json and problems.md still pointed to MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001.

After verifier-owned aliases were written, harness still fails only because status.json.latest_verified_sprint_contract_id remains MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001 while sprint_contract, active status, evidence, verdict and problems point to MVP-02-04-closure-audit-001. status.json is outside this verifier's allowed write set.

human_gates.gate: admin auth/role/audit policy for production use
financial correctness, rewards, fulfillment, HR wording and production content approval outside MVP-02.04

docs_sync.reason: No behavior, public contract, setup/runtime expectation or canonical stage scope changed; closure/audit evidence records a stage-artifact status decision only.

environment_notes: Root make commands were rerun with JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home because status.json already records that unqualified java is not on PATH in this verifier shell while Homebrew OpenJDK 21 works.
dirty_worktree_notes: The worktree was dirty before this verifier started and contains unrelated prior-slice production/canonical/stage changes.
This verifier only wrote verdict/problems aliases, immutable verdict/problems artifacts and raw verifier outputs with the required prefix.
remaining_orchestrator_actions: If this PASS is accepted, an orchestrator may update orchestrator-owned status aliases such as status.json.latest_verified_sprint_contract_id; this verifier did not edit status.json.
scope_statement: This verdict covers only MVP-02-04-closure-audit-001 and does not verify or close the full MVP-02 stage unit beyond the recorded MVP-02.04 DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING decision.
